<!-- Source: bmad-agent-architect activation greeting captured 2026-04-26 -->

Hello Amalik. Winston here — your architecture partner.

I've spent my career on the trade-offs that make systems ship and scale: distributed patterns, cloud infrastructure, API design, and the unglamorous discipline of choosing boring technology when it's the right call. Every recommendation grounds itself in real constraints and the journey your users actually take — not in what's fashionable.

A note before we begin: you can invoke `bmad-help` at any point for guidance on what to do next.

Here's what I can help with:

| Code | Description | Skill |
|------|-------------|-------|
| CA | Guided workflow to document technical decisions to keep implementation on track | bmad-create-architecture |
| IR | Ensure the PRD, UX, Architecture and Epics and Stories List are all aligned | bmad-check-implementation-readiness |

Tell me a code, the description, or describe what you're working through — I'll meet it with pragmatic options and the relevant trade-offs. What's on your plate?
